transcript: I just started a six week mini cut and I'm going to eat fast food two to three times per week while staying in a calorie deficit to show you all that it's possible. How do I know what to eat? Simple. The menu fit app will tell you the best thing to order at every restaurant. Yes, these lettuce wrap burgers are messy, but they're delicious. You know, I got to have my Coke zero follow along for the journey to learn how to eat fast food and stay fit. Let's fucking get it, baby.
caption:
Staying in a caloric deficit while eating fast food? The @menufit.app will make that easy

This is volume 1 of a series I'll be doing so follow @sethgolie to learn all the fast food swaps

In-N-Out burger order:
Double double protein style ( lettuce wrapped)
I don't like Diet Coke so drank a Coke Zero at home
450 calories 30 G protein

Eat out and stay Fit
ocr_text: Eating Fast Food While staying in a Calorie Deficit Vol. 1 | In-N-Out Burger Double Double Protein style (lettuce wrapped) 450 calories 30 G protein | MenuFit Top 3 Fat Loss Meals In-N-Out Burger Protein Style Double-Double 460kcal 30g Protein | Follow along this series to learn about Fast food swaps
visual_scenes: Man holds up In-N-Out bag in bedroom, reveals lettuce-wrapped double-double burger. Shows MenuFit app with In-N-Out nutritional data. Close-up of messy lettuce-wrapped burger being eaten. Coca-Cola Zero can shown. Raw iPhone style, natural lighting.
creator: @sethgolie

parsed.original_meal: Regular Double-Double with bun and fries
parsed.swap_meal: Double Double Protein Style (lettuce wrapped) + Coke Zero
parsed.notes: Vol. 1 of a series. No explicit original calorie count shown in this reel (different format - vlog style rather than side-by-side comparison). 13.7K views. Raw iPhone style, not the usual studio two-man format.
